title: Verify existing implementation of token expiry checker
description: The `isTokenExpired(token: string): boolean` function already exists in `src/auth/token-utils.ts` and all 3 tests pass. Implementation decodes JWT and checks exp claim. Pipeline failed at ship stage (git push rejected due to stale branch), not at implementation.
existing_patterns: src/auth/jwt-service.ts - JWT encoding/decoding with base64url, TokenPayload type with exp claim
